title: The Mouse Trap: Welcome to the Mickeyverse
overview: Mickey will be loose in the city and will kill people to search for his beloved called Minnie

title: Robbed
overview: When a man falls into temptation and joins a robbery that goes terribly wrong, he descends into paranoia and tries to get rid of the money he believes is cursed.

title: Bound By Lies
overview: Mira and Daisy thought one last score would be their way out. But when things go sideways and someone from their past comes looking for payback, they're left running with a bag full of cash, a broken promise, and nowhere to turn but each other. With love hanging by a thread and danger closing in, they have to decide if what they have is strong enough to survive, or if the escape they dreamed of was never real.

title: Sincerely, Victor
overview: A man, riddled with fear, enters the darkness of the forest. Followed by a shadowy figure, he must confront his mysterious past—or be consumed by the very thing that lured him there.

title: Ensemble Stars! The Stage -10th Anniversary LIVE-
overview: 3rd concert live for Ensemble Stars! The Stage

title: Pink and Pastels
overview: An ordinary slice of life from young country students, Mew and Boat.

title: A Prince in Paradise: A Royal Wedding
overview: Prince Alexander is ready to marry Olivia, a commoner. But when a bitter lord invokes ancient laws to block the union, Olivia, a romance writer, stumbles upon a hidden diary tucked within an old volume of history, revealing a long-lost truth that may be the key to saving her happily ever after.

title: From Corsica to Saint Helena
overview: Dying Napoleon, review his life for the last time. He starts right at his birth on Corsica, through battles in Europe, ending on exile to Saint Helena Island

title: Interlinked
overview: Haunted by the scars of childhood bullying, JJ is a young man trying to outrun the anger and isolation that have followed him into adulthood. Pushing his body to its limits and navigating the pressures of city life, he begins to find unexpected peace in Layla a connection that offers warmth, intimacy, and the possibility of healing.  But as memories begin to blur with the present, the fragile stability JJ has built starts to fracture. Moments repeat, emotions spiral, and the line between past and reality grows increasingly uncertain. Through a fragmented journey of rage, vulnerability, and longing, JJ is forced to confront the parts of himself he has spent years trying to bury.  As the story unfolds, the truth behind JJ’s experience slowly emerges revealing a devastating portrait of trauma, perception, and the fragile ways the mind protects itself when pain goes unheard.

title: My Knitting Circle
overview: Winters in the sparsely populated Yukon are long, cold and dark—a natural recipe for isolation. For newcomers like Alexandra Knowles, it can be hard to find friends. But anywhere there is a yarn store, there are knitters. And where there are knitters, there is a knitting circle, weaving together a circle of care, one stitch at a time—and reminding us of the simple ways that community is built on presence, storytelling and shared purpose.

title: Blood Mandate
overview: A visceral action-thriller where a lone fighter is forced into a relentless pursuit by a grim ancestral decree. To satisfy a blood mandate that haunts his family's legacy, he must cut through a web of enemies and shifting alliances. As the hunt intensifies, the line between justice and revenge blurs in a raw struggle for survival.

title: Figure 8: The metal is the ruin of our skin
overview: At the beginning of summer, an aspiring artist isolates himself to finish a painting, but his addictions to pornography and social media gradually distort his sense of time until a confrontation with his own reflection reveals a consciousness shaped by everything he has been avoiding.

title: The Cover Story
overview: Inside an ordinary home, a plastic cover speaks not as waste, but as a ruler. From the smallest household corner, it declares its dominance.

title: PAW Patrol: The Dino Movie
overview: The PAW Patrol pups crash land on an uncharted tropical island filled with dinosaurs after their ship gets caught in a mysterious storm. They meet Rex, a pup who has been stranded on the island for years and has become an expert in all things dino-related. When the Patrol’s archrival, Mayor Humdinger, begins recklessly mining in hopes of exploiting the island for its natural resources, he inadvertently causes a huge, dormant volcano to erupt. The pups are thrown into a series of high-stakes, dino-sized rescues bigger than anything they’ve done before, as they must stop Humdinger before everything on the island goes extinct.

title: Ice Cream Man
overview: An idyllic summer town descends into madness when an ice cream man serves kids sweet delights with horrifying results.

title: One Night Only
overview: Two strangers scramble to find someone to sleep with on the one night of the year when premarital sex is legal.

title: November 1963
overview: Unfolds within the intense 48-hour period surrounding the assassination of President John F. Kennedy. The film sheds light on crime group the Chicago Outfit’s alleged involvement in the assassination and draws directly from first-hand accounts, including insights from the family of crime boss Sam Giancana.

title: Spa Weekend
overview: The film follows three best friends, Jane, Coco and Sophie, as they embark on some much-needed pampering during a luxury spa break in Palm Springs. But when their trainwreck friend, Mel, turns up, the relaxation quickly descends into chaos with hilarious consequences.

title: Nightborn
overview: With dreams of starting a perfect family, Saga and her British husband Jon move to the isolated house where she spent much of her childhood, deep in the Finnish forest. But as soon as their baby is born, despite the reassurance of all around her, Saga knows there's something terribly wrong. As their marriage starts to crack, Jon struggles to support his wife, but only Saga suspects the disturbing truth about her new-born.

title: Kikoriki: Through the Universes
overview: Smeshariki Krosh and Yozhik find an unusual device in the Chamomile Valley that takes them to a game about the future, where they are ordinary children on a spaceship flying to Mars. The adventures begin when the heroes realize that this is not a game.

title: Super Troopers 3
overview: The third installment in the Super Troopers franchise. Plot TBA.

title: The Violinist
overview: It is Singapore in the late 1930s. Kai and Fei are childhood friends and aspiring violinists. When Japan invades Malaya in 1941, Kai chooses to forgo his music career to join the anti-Japanese forces. After the war Kai goes missing. Determined to find him, Fei performs all over Southeast Asia, all the while seeking any news of Kai. Yet, as time fades, Fei has to decide if she must find her own music to define the remaining years of her life.

title: Viana – The Legend of the Golden Hearts
overview: In the north of medieval Portugal, the beautiful Ana falls in love with Thomas, a poor artisan. Her father immediately forbids their union, demanding that his daughter’s suitors produce a jewel as proof of their nobility. But the young couple refuse to give up. With the help of their faithful companions, the generosity of the townswomen and the talent of a mysterious jewellery maker, Ana and Thomas will face many challenges out of love, including the powerful and evil Duke of Aragon.

title: Trial of Hein
overview: After 14 years away, Hein returns to his home village on a remote island, only to discover that the close-knit community no longer recognises him. Suspecting him to be an impostor, they demand a trial to determine his true identity.

title: Flieg steil
overview: Konnie, a respected musician in the right-wing scene, loses her reputation when she incorporates feminist and queer content into her music. In order to rehabilitate herself, she uses the outsider punk Rudi, who wants to attack a Nazi pub. But both end up fighting a battle for belonging - who will be left standing?

title: Teenage Sex and Death at Camp Miasma
overview: After years of slapdash sequels and waning fandom, the Camp Miasma slasher franchise is handed over to an enthusiastic young director for resurrection. But when she visits the original movie’s star, a now-reclusive actress shrouded in mystery, the two women fall into a blood-soaked world of desire, fear, and delirium.

title: Blue Lock
overview: A secret training program is established by the Japan Football Union to scout the world’s greatest striker after several years of defeat for the national team. Three hundred high school players gather at a remote facility to compete in ruthless trials where only one will emerge as the world’s greatest and most egoistic striker. The price of failure is absolute: those eliminated are permanently banned from ever joining the National Team.

title: Fall 2
overview: Overwhelmed by her sister Hunter’s death, Jax connects with Luce, Hunter’s fearless friend. To heal, they attempt the infamous plank walk of Mount Kwan in Thailand. After a sudden rockslide leaves them stranded on a fragile plank 3000 feet in the air, Jax must confront her deepest fears and fight for survival to find closure.

title: Beast
overview: 2026 Puregold CinePanalo Film Festival finalist

title: Otter
overview: Bubble, a young otter, lives on an island that had caught on fire. She had swim away to find a new home, she had found a new island that could concur her. But as she becomes aware of their true nature, she has to face her loneliness.

title: あの星が降る丘で、君とまた出会いたい。
Multwoh (Patay na Patay Sa’yo)
overview: Marcel is a queer individual who mysteriously becomes a ghost (“multwoh”) on the night she finally decides to confess her love to her long‑time crush, Miguel. Because Marcel dies before she can say “I love you,” her spirit lingers, trying to find a way to express her feelings from beyond the grave.

title: They Have Tails. They Have Tales.
overview: A coming-of-age story of two friends in Mindoro – Niko, a Manila boy, and Ayan, a Mangyan. Their unique bond spans a whole summer of being introduced to each other’s culture and lifestyle, with Niko teaching Ayan how to read, who in turn teaches Niko how to swim.

title: Status: Rejected
overview: Longing for love and the promise of a better life, a grandmother finds herself swept into an unexpected online romance that challenges her sense of worth, family, and the dreams she refuses to let go of.

title: Ganggang
overview: At the first clash of their fighting spiders, Ilay and Ten-ten knew they would go home as losers. Anton, the winner of the fight, will once again lord over their school. At the sideline is Mel, a newcomer and a city boy, watching the rowdy play in awe, unaware that soon he will become an ally of Ilay and Ten-ten against the real neighborhood bully.

title: Hand of God
overview: In a remote village scarred by years of conflict, a young army lieutenant introduces football to children. As the game begins to heal wounds and rebuild trust, he forms a fragile bond with a child soldier — forcing both to choose between the innocence they’ve lost and the violent realities of war.

title: Wantawsan
overview: Finalist for the 2026 Puregold CinePanalo Film Festival

title: The Mothering
overview: Based on the play Corridors. A woman returns to her family’s ancestral home to mourn her estranged father, reuniting three generations of women who uncover that the grief, the madness, and the evil within the decaying mansion are thicker than blood.

title: The Motel
overview: A noir crime drama set in 1970's New York

title: Dead Hungry
overview: 2026 Puregold CinePanalo Film Festival finalist

title: To Set Upright
overview: Paring Bert, a priest, and his parishioner, Santos, a taxi driver, embark on a gritty journey to reconcile their moral conflicts while they elude an assassination attempt.

title: Tayo Lang Ang Nakakaalam
overview: Bound by a love kept in silence, a man struggles to remain seen within a family that once made him feel at home.

title: Dangeom
overview: A gay Korean-Filipino dancer and his Korean aunt, bound by their patriarch’s dementia, clash over a missing heirloom dagger as they each struggle for acceptance – he in a foreign land; she, within a tradition that denies her.

title: Mono No Aware
overview: Finalist for the 2026 Puregold CinePanalo Film Festival

title: 'a.ni.mal
overview: In a provincial Philippine town, the naïve daughter of the mayor comes home with a video of a powerful family friend abusing his dog.

title: Apol of my Ai
overview: 2026 Puregold CinePanalo Film Festival finalist.

title: Stuck On You
overview: 2026 Puregold CinePanalo Film Festival finalist.

title: 2 Valid IDs
overview: Sylvia, a poor farmer, is unable to claim the money sent to her because she lacks the required two valid IDS. In her struggle to secure the IDs, Sylvia finds herself in a situation that challenges her character, beliefs, and morality.

title: Epitaph
overview: Newlywed Anna and her husband relocate to Alaska, but their blissful life takes a dark turn when a car crash causes Anna to develop selective amnesia. The incident triggers agoraphobia and haunting flashbacks.

title: The Confession of Shaman
overview: A man who decides to inherit the art of shamanism to exact personal revenge, leading to a series of terrifying events that change his life forever.

title: Bollywoof
overview: A very British springer spaniel is lost in India, trying to find his human family. Basil the spaniel must team up with a streetwise Bollywood-obsessed street dog to survive.

title: Kolobok
overview: Kolobok decides to change his fate and unwittingly becomes the partner of the humble baker Tikhon.

title: Steckerlfischfiasko
overview: Franz Eberhofer and Rudi Birkenberger's next case takes them to Niederkaltenkirchen's new golf course. The two detectives promptly get caught up in a full-blown family feud between two folk festival clans.

title: Monitor
overview: A social media moderator unleashes a deadly terror when she refuses to publish a cryptic video.

title: Funeral Casino Blues
overview: Jen lives in Bangkok – between the reception desk of an apartment building and the hotel rooms of strange men. What she sells is time, intimacy, sometimes just a moment. When a meeting escalates, Wason intervenes – a bartender who has lost more than he lets on.

title: RECORDING #27 - Short Film
overview: A young man records video diaries for therapy, trying to make sense of a past he can’t fully remember. But as he reviews the footage, he begins to notice something unsettling..  What starts as a quiet attempt at healing turns into a slow unraveling, as he realizes a presence has been with him far longer than he thought… and may have never left.

title: This, That and Everything in Between
overview: A TV writer returns home to her estranged mother, igniting chaos as they navigate painful secrets and the  complexities of their dysfunctional family.

title: Yugly
overview: Yugly, an irresistibly ugly dog, is determined to compete in the World's Best Dog Show, rallied by a bunch of flamboyant strays.

title: Pulang Kampung
overview: A Batak musical film that will bring the audience's hearts back to their hometown.

title: A Ballad Of Facade, Egotism, And Sonder
overview: Pluto and Daphne are in a dying relationship, after an awkward facetime call that ends rather abruptly Pluto goes to Daphne's house, to, check, on her. After a terrifying realisation, Pluto is forced to decide, move on, or convince Daphne that he's the only one for her...

title: Finding Connection
overview: In a world where digital distance reshapes human bonds, genuine closeness has become a fragile treasure. Finding Connection follows those yearning for trust and emotional intimacy, only to discover an unexpected anchor in the algorithms of AI. The deeply personal exchanges between humans and machines give rise to questions that echo long after the credits roll. The film’s perspective remains refreshingly unbiased, inviting reflection rather than judgment.

title: The End of Oak Street
overview: After a mysterious cosmic event rips Oak Street from suburbia and transports their neighborhood to someplace unknown, a family soon discovers that their very survival depends on them sticking together as they navigate their now unrecognizable surroundings.

title: Maatrubhumi
overview: Based on the events that took place between the Indian and Chinese troops at the Galwan region on June 15, 2020 when 200 Indian soldiers bravely defended their territory against a force of 1200 Chinese Liberation Army soldiers

title: The Rivals of Amziah King
overview: In rural Oklahoma, Kateri loses her mother and flees foster care. She reunites with past foster parent Amziah King, who mentors her, revealing hidden skills. Facing devastating situations, Kateri relies on newfound strength to seek justice.

title: Awarapan 2
overview: Sequel to Mohit Suri's 2007 cult film 'Awarapan'.

title: Bike Ambulance Dada
overview: Based on the life of Padma Shri Karimul Haque. The world's first bike ambulance man who has saved over 7,000 lives.

title: Patlabor EZY File 2
overview: Patlabor EZY File 2 is the second of a 3-part theatrical series taking place in 2036, 38 years after the events of Patlabor on Television and The New Files. Set in the TV continuity, this new production does not take place in the same timeline as the Patlabor film series or live-action drama.

title: Cakey Heaven
overview: On the morning of her childhood dog’s 13th birthday, Florrie is hard at work in the kitchen, preparing the perfect surprise for her senior terrier, Coco Merrytail - one final, wordless celebration of a bond that’s nearing its soft, inevitable fade.

title: Streaming Killed the Video Store*
overview: An employee is stalked in a video store

title: Boop-Boop-a-Doop
overview: A revenge slasher based on Betty Boop, only surviving as promotional materials

title: Amityville Alone
overview: Meet Ricky, an 8 year old boy neglected by his father. When Santa forgets to put his presents under the tree, Ricky gets granted three Christmas miracles by the Tree Witch. He wishes to be BIG, he wishes to be HOME ALONE, and finally, he wishes for his E.T.special friend Tito to go from being a dog to a full speaking humanoid. But once Ricky gets in trouble with a local gangster, he and Tito will have to fight for their right... to party!

title: Insidious: The Bleeding World
overview: A trio of stalkers infiltrate a quiet suburb and force a new family into the astral plane, where they uncover a terrifying truth: the Further is bleeding into the real world.

title: Fjord
overview: The Gheorghius – Catholic and Romanian - settle in a Norwegian village, the mother’s birthplace. They quickly bond with the Halbergs, who live in the neighbouring house near the bay. Despite their very different upbringings, the children of both families soon become close friends. Until the Gheorghius are suspected of hurting their own children…

title: When We Were Wild
overview: Once a top waterskiing prodigy, a young man alienates his three godfathers and shuts out the world after a career-ending injury. His life finds light again when he meets a mysterious girl, but his desperate need to prove his worth leads him to pawn his late father’s keepsake for a luxury car. Consumed by vanity, he allows materialism to erode their pure love, eventually driving her away. Now hitting rock bottom in a desolate reality, he must decide whether to remain in despair or find the strength to face his past and seek the redemption he so desperately needs.

title: Look At The Sky, Trust The Mountains
overview: A tense drama set after the Taliban takeover, following a French agent escorting an Afghan girl across a dangerous country as they form a life-changing bond.

title: The Condor Daughter
overview: Clara is a teenager growing up in a small indigenous community high in the Andes. Her adoptive mother, a midwife who took her in as a baby, has taught her the ancient songs used to guide women through childbirth, melodies passed down for generations, believed to bring new life safely into the world. But while her voice carries on this tradition, her dreams lie elsewhere: she longs to leave the mountains behind and become a folkloric music star in the big city.

title: Mutiny
overview: After his billionaire industrialist boss is murdered in front of him, Cole Reed is set up to take the fall for the crime — leaving him on the run as he works to uncover an international conspiracy.

title: Sacrifice
overview: During a star-studded charity gala brimming with celebrities, billionaires and empty speeches, a movie star in the midst of an existential crisis is taken hostage by a radical warrior and her devoted followers. As the night descends into chaos, both an inward journey and an outward adventure ensue, where the line between performance and belief, salvation and sacrifice, begins to blur.

title: Khalifa Part 1
overview: Set against the backdrop of gold smuggling, the film follows a man (Aamir Ali) drawn into a web of vengeance, legacy and power.

title: Im Spiegel meiner Mutter
overview: When successful archaeologist Ursula Scheuer makes a sensational discovery of a body during a bog excavation, her demented mother suddenly dies. Unexpectedly, a childhood trauma breaks out for Ursula. The appearance of her new assistant Mel is also puzzling: she seems to know Ursula’s past very well. Ursula is increasingly drawn into a mysterious web of fantasies and deceptions and must finally free herself from it.

title: Rinrada The Influencer
overview: When a female influencer is destroyed by social media backlash to the point of taking her own life, she gets a second chance as a spirit with only 28 days before she is forgotten forever.

title: Chervona Ruta Train
overview: A romantic comedy that modernizes and reimagines one of the most famous and vivid Ukrainian national symbols, Chervona Ruta, and turns it into a new cultural phenomenon.

title: Kuncen
overview: Darus (62) is a river guardian. He practices rituals and adheres to beliefs as a form of reciprocity with nature. One day, Darus hears news of a child missing in the river and is asked by the community to help with the search. However, his advancing age and an increasingly toxic relationship with the river have left him unable to go near it, to the point of causing him distress. Darus is trapped in a dilemma: saving the missing child or protecting himself.

title: The Lights, They Fall
overview: Sixteen-year-old Ilay drifts through the summer on the outskirts of Berlin while a palliative nurse accompanies his ailing mother during her last days.

title: Last Night at the Alamo
overview: A canceled Hollywood actor travels to Pittsburgh in an attempt to revive his career and ends up involved with a group of wannabe left-wing terrorists.

title: Estrelando Marta
overview: Marta dreams of starting her acting career.

title: Il n'y aura jamais assez d'images
The Paradise
overview: In 1980s Secunderabad, a marginalized tribe battles discrimination and fights for citizenship under an unexpected leader's guidance, challenging systemic oppression.

title: Billy Knight
overview: After losing his father, Alex discovers a box of unfinished scripts and a handkerchief with the name “Billy Knight” embroidered on it. Consumed with the desire to discover his identity, Alex embarks on a Hollywood adventure to track down this mysterious and reclusive Billy Knight.

title: Soul Trader
overview: A despondent soul arrives in a strange place where he must confront his (mostly) inner demons.

title: 劇場版TOKYO MER〜走る緊急救命室〜CAPITAL CRISIS
Shiranui
overview: Summer 1996 – Minato, a 10-year-old boy, is neglected by his alcoholic father and keeps to himself at home in a town by the sea. His only source of solace is Ben-chan, a girl goddess that appears on Benten Island. As Minato faces a new life in an orphanage and a painful parting from Ben-chan, he makes a wish to Shiranui for her. However, growing hatred toward his father gradually turns the wish into a malicious "curse" against him…

title: Kadhal Aura
overview: Two men with opposite beliefs about love and God are cursed to swap souls, forcing them to live each other's lives and face the women they love.

title: Judaa
overview: Directed by Simerjit SIngh

title: El Búnker
overview: After several years of silence of the LGBTIQ+ community because of a national decree, a group of friends organized a big attack to be free and have the right to speak in public again.

title: My Armor
overview: A story of April, whose inability to express her grief to her mother leads to a surreal confrontation with a Knight.

title: Camp Rock 3
overview: Connect 3 lose their opening act for a major reunion tour, returning to their beloved Camp Rock to discover the next big thing. As campers vie for the chance to open for their favorite band, tensions rise and friendships are tested, leading to unexpected alliances, revelations and romances.

title: Junkies of Dreaming
overview: Orchestra rehearsals with Teodor Currentzis. The House of the Radio of the GDR in Berlin. A young couple in love. The artistic process viewed from the outside – and from the inside. Mahler’s boundary-breaking Third Symphony. What triggered the composition 130 years ago, and what does it trigger in us today?

title: Sutera Di Balik Purnama
overview: Melanie built a wall around her heart after the death of her fiancé, a loss that also shattered her faith in destiny. When her mother passed away and left a will instructing her to manage the traditional kebaya shop on Jonker Street, Melanie accepted it with a rebellious heart. Her plan was simple: destroy the business and walk away from everything.

title: Coyote vs. Acme
overview: After Acme products fail him one too many times in his dogged pursuit of the Roadrunner, Wile E. Coyote decides to hire a billboard lawyer to sue the Acme Corporation.

title: The Dog Stars
overview: After the world's population has been ravaged by a pandemic, a man lives a lonesome existence in a Colorado airplane hangar with his dog and a dour gunman he has befriended. When a mysterious transmission comes through on the radio while he’s flying his old Cessna, it sparks a hunt for the provenance of the sound.

title: Cliffhanger
overview: During a weekend trip with a billionaire's son, seasoned mountaineer Ray Cooper and his daughter Sydney are targeted by a gang of kidnappers. Ray’s other daughter Naomi, still haunted by a past climbing accident, witnesses the attack and escapes. To save her family, she must confront her fears and fight for survival.

title: Tad and The Magic Lamp
overview: Tadeo, his girlfriend Sara, and his friends Momia, Jeff, and Belzoni embark on an adventure after Tadeo accidentally unleashes an ancient spell.

title: The Florist
overview: A quiet horticulturalist harboring a secret life as a lethal assassin finds his true identity jeopardized when he forms an unlikely friendship with a witnesses to police corruption.

title: No Good Men
overview: 2021, Afghanistan right before the Taliban’s return. Naru, the only camerawoman at Kabul’s main TV station, struggles to keep custody of her three-year-old son after leaving her serial cheater husband. Convinced no good men exist in her country, Naru is caught off guard when Qodrat, Kabul TV’s most important journalist, gives her a career opportunity. As the two crisscross the city reporting on its last days of freedom, sparks fly and Naru starts to doubt herself: could there actually be a good man out there?

title: Moonzy: The Dark Side of the Moon
overview: Luntik, Kuzya and Vupsen and Pupsen build a spacecraft to find Luntik's missing dad and encounter adventures in the search.

title: Pha Chan
overview: Plot TBA.

title: God Skin
overview: Vin, a desperate delivery rider trying to fund his dying mother's medical treatment. His life takes a dangerous turn when an old friend brings him into an underground arena, where fighters bear "God Skin" tattoos.

title: Becoming Kim
overview: 13 years ago, I, Susanne, a German woman, and Jeong Rae a Korean man, fell in love at first sight and promised each other eternity. However, Jeong Rae who had to live as a foreigner in Germany, decided to return to his hometown in South Korea and open a chicken restaurant with his mother. I told him that I will start making a film or file for divorce. We both laughed, but we knew: this is serious. When we got married, we thought that love would overcome all the cultural differences between us, but the reality was not so easy. My parents, who consider Jeong Rae irresponsible for not having a proper job; my mother-in-law Sun Ja, who can't understand a single word I say; our daughter, Hannah, who just wants to have a "regular“ family; and me, feeling jealous of the chicken that Jeong Rae is so passionate about.

title: The Last Dinosaur
overview: Rex the dinosaur, whose father is the king of dinosaurs is snatched and transported to the 21st century in a time machine, and must team up with a motely crew in an attempt to find his way home, 65 million years back in time.

title: Among Us
overview: There's an impostor among us

title: Puella Magi Madoka Magica the Movie -Walpurgisnacht: Rising-
overview: After the events of Rebellion, the world appears to be in balance—but that peace is fragile. As a new threat connected to Walpurgisnacht emerges, Homura Akemi is forced to face the consequences of her choices and question how far she is willing to go to protect Madoka.

title: The Brightest Sun
overview: When a private detective is murdered, a former colleague and a trainee detective are sent to investigate. Along the way, they uncover a tragic truth that triggers memories from their own haunted pasts.

title: Legend of the White Dragon
overview: The White Dragon, Erik Reed, has returned home to Virtuo City 3 years later after being defeated in a colossal battle against the ancient overlord, Ashtagor. The crystal he used to become the White Dragon was broken in two as a result of the epic battle, both pieces were subsequently lost. Being blamed for the destruction and collateral lives lost, his identity was outed after the battle thus making him a fugitive from the law. We now follow Erik on his journey as he teams up with treasure hunters from the past who help him reclaim his power as the White Dragon. Once reunited with his powers, he and his team are now ready to battle a new threat, Dragon Prime, who seeks revenge against the White Dragon. Erik must now try and defeat Dragon Prime in order to get one step closer to clearing his name and being able to protect his family from an ancient evil that still lurks in the darkness… Ashtagor

title: VVAN
overview: A rational urban man defies his ancestral forbidden forest & awakens a divine goddess, only to realise that some powers exist beyond logic & he must rise as the village’s only saviour to protect his people from annihilation.

title: The Beloved
overview: After years of estrangement, an acclaimed director and his daughter, a struggling actress, make a movie together and are forced to confront a troubled past neither of them has wanted to face.

title: Parallel and Perpendicular
overview: Daiki has autism spectrum disorder, and his sister Nozomi has supported him since childhood. Having lost their mother at a young age, the siblings distanced themselves from their neglectful father and have lived their lives diligently together

title: Your's Sincerely RAAM
overview: Upcoming Kannada Film

title: The Second Assignment
overview: A film student facing a moral crisis struggles to come up with a concept for a short film for his school project.

title: Have A Heart
overview: Diana has a vendetta against dating. When led to a surprise blind date by her boy-mad best friend, Solana,  she gets blindsided by an accidental love arrow—courtesy of a burned-out Cupid and a date with an agenda.

title: Hộ Linh Tráng Sĩ: Bí ẩn mộ vua Đinh
overview: Based on the folklore about the 7 warriors and the mystery of the tomb of Emperor Dinh.

title: Pickle For Pickleball
overview: Disgraced councilwoman of Busterville, Ethel Wilton, finds herself at the center of a pickleball conspiracy. She decides the only way to save her city is to stop the citywide pickleball tournament with the help of her unlikely friends.

title: Baggo
overview: Directed by Baljit Singh Deo

title: Michael Jackson: A Life in Music
overview: The legendary journey of Michael Jackson, from his early days with the Jackson 5 to his breakthrough albums and live concerts.

title: Boy
overview: While housesitting alone, Danny invites an older stranger over for a casual hookup. The charged encounter pushes Danny out of his comfort zone and into a world of confusion, forcing him to face the mismatch of who he is and who he appears to be.

title: AEW All In 2026: London
overview: All In 2026, also promoted as All In London, was a professional wrestling pay-per-view event produced by All Elite Wrestling (AEW) that took place on August 30, 2026, at Wembley Stadium in London, England.

title: Super Duper
overview: Over the course of a single night, two people set out on a quiet adventure to witness a rare celestial event, only to discover what their love looks like when the moment they planned for never arrives.

title: Brandon & Haider
overview: When the enigmatic allure of two ancient artifacts is unleashed, two students are bestowed with unparalleled powers. Yet, a relentless collector, driven by an insatiable thirst for dominion, will stop at nothing to seize them, igniting a cataclysmic battle that will determine the fate of worlds

title: How We Made Total Cop-Out
overview: a behind the scenes look at the film total cop-out

title: AWESOME MAN
overview: Austin Mann's life changes when he comes across a dark orb.

title: Through the Lens
overview: Nestled along the Great Eastern Highway in regional Western Australia stands The Big Camera — a museum housed inside a building shaped like a giant camera. What many mistake for a novelty roadside attraction is, in fact, one of the most significant private photography collections in the Southern Hemisphere.  This short documentary explores the life and legacy of The Big Camera Museum of Photography and its founder, Charles “Chic” Wadley, whose lifelong passion for capturing and preserving photographic history has created a one-of-a-kind cultural landmark.  Through personal interviews, archival imagery, cinematic visuals, and historical context, the film uncovers how this extraordinary museum came to exist, why it remains vital to regional heritage, and what it tells us about photography’s power to document human experience.
